---
title: "Pharmaceutial"
listing: 
  id: listing-target
  contents: 
    - listings/target.yml
metadata-files: 
  - listings/_metadata_target.yml
---

{{< include _listing-preamble.qmd >}}

### Target

###  {.unlisted}

::: {#listing-target .column-body-outset-right}
:::

{{< include _listing-footer.qmd >}}
